{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "brettgervasoni", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/34056000?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/brettgervasoni", "id": 34056000, "login": "brettgervasoni", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM0MDU2MDAw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42151", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-200", "CWE-312"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-312", "name": "Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information"}], "description": "### Impact

Users who use Azure AD remote write with OAuth authentication are impacted.

The `client_secret` field in the Azure AD remote write OAuth configuration (`storage/remote/azuread`) was typed as `string` instead of `Secret`. Prometheus redacts fields of type `Secret` when serving the configuration via the `/-/config` HTTP API endpoint. Because the field was a plain string, the Azure OAuth client secret was exposed in plaintext to any user or process with access to that endpoint.

### Patches

The problem has been patched by changing `ClientSecret` in `OAuthConfig` to `Secret`. Users should upgrade to 3.11.3 or 3.5.3 LTS.

### Workarounds

Users  who can not upgrade can switch to Managed Identity or Workload Identity authentication for Azure AD remote write, which do not involve a client secret.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wg65-39gg-5wfj", "html_url": "https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/security/advisories/GHSA-wg65-39gg-5wfj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wg65-39gg-5wfj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42151"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-04-27T14:51:36Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/291750?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/roidelapluie/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/roidelapluie/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/roidelapluie/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/roidelapluie/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/roidelapluie", "id": 291750, "login": "roidelapluie", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI5MTc1MA==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/roidelapluie/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/roidelapluie/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/roidelapluie/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/roidelapluie/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/roidelapluie/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/roidelapluie", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "high", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Prometheus Azure AD remote write OAuth client secret exposed via config API", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T14:51:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/prometheus/prometheus/security-advisories/GHSA-wg65-39gg-5wfj", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "", "name": "prometheus"}, "patched_versions": "3.5.3 and 3.11.3", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.48.0 and < 3.5.3 ; >= 3.6.0 and <3.11.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Prometheus Azure AD remote write OAuth client secret exposed via config API
